personalInfo.name: MIKITA KAVALIOU
personalInfo.title: Back-End Engineer | Symfony 7 & Node.js
personalInfo.professionalObjective: Backend Architect specializing in high-performance PHP (Symfony 7), Node.js, and distributed systems. Expert in secure multi-tenant SaaS architectures, fintech integrations (Stripe Connect), and resilient AI failover systems for mission-critical applications.
personalInfo.status: Based in Grenoble, France | VPF Visa – Free access to the French job market

experience.title: Lead Back End Developer
responsibilities: Symfony Expert: Architected mission-critical APIs using Symfony 6/7 and API Platform, enforcing Clean Architecture and SOLID principles across all backend services.
Asynchronous Processing: Implemented robust background job systems using Symfony Messenger and Redis, handling thousands of concurrent webhooks with zero message loss.
Fintech Integration: Developed advanced Stripe Connect workflows for multi-party payouts, including automated KYC verification and complex commission routing.
Performance Tuning: Optimized PHP FPM and PostgreSQL configurations, resulting in a 30% reduction in API response times and significant infrastructure cost savings.
Containerized backend services with Docker and deployed on AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda), implementing auto-scaling strategies to handle production traffic spikes.
Implemented automated testing pipelines (PHPUnit/Behat) achieving 85% code coverage across backend services, significantly reducing regression risk during deployments.

experience.title: Freelance Backend Developer
responsibilities: Lexity (EdTech) : Engineered a Composite AI Service Layer in Node.js/TypeScript orchestrating Gemini, Groq, and Cerebras with automated failover, token-cost throttling, and Prometheus/Grafana observability — 99.9% uptime.

ZIRO.FIT (Marketplace) : Architected high-throughput data layers using LATERAL JOINs and materialized views (80% DB load reduction), developed advanced Stripe Connect workflows for multi-party payouts with KYC verification.

Interly (Coaching IA) : Built Lexity MVP and Interly MVP from scratch (Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL), implemented automated testing pipelines at 85% code coverage, containerized and deployed on AWS.

experience.title: Junior Back End Developer
responsibilities: Developed PHP/Symfony application modules in Agile teams, applying architectural patterns and production code best practices learned through structured code reviews.
Engineered complex SQL queries and optimized Doctrine ORM performance, reducing slowest-query response times by 35% on high-traffic endpoints.

education.institution: Minsk State Higher College of Radiotechnics
education.description: Program covering analog/digital electronics and low-level microcontroller programming (C, Assembly).
Advanced coursework in embedded systems, mobile development (Java/Kotlin), and real-time architectures.
